'''chagala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadjudicator|coadjudicator]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-g-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadjudicator|coadjudicator]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chagala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chægælæth|chægælæth]] || [[word:chægælæj|chægælæj]] || [[word:chægælæsh|chægælæsh]] || [[word:chægælæ|chægælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chagagalath|chagagalath]] || [[word:chagagalaj|chagagalaj]] || [[word:chagagalash|chagagalash]] || [[word:chagagala|chagagala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chagalath|chagalath]] || [[word:chagalaj|chagalaj]] || [[word:chagalash|chagalash]] || [[word:chagala|chagala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chagaflath|chagaflath]] || [[word:chagaflaj|chagaflaj]] || [[word:chagaflash|chagaflash]] || [[word:chagaflaf|chagaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chagalatha|chagalatha]] || [[word:chagalaja|chagalaja]] || [[word:chagalasha|chagalasha]] || [[word:chagalaka|chagalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chagalath|chagalath]] || [[word:chagalaj|chagalaj]] || [[word:chagalash|chagalash]] || [[word:chagala|chagala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chagalathal|chagalathal]] || [[word:chagalajal|chagalajal]] || [[word:chagalashal|chagalashal]] || [[word:chagalakal|chagalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chagalathatha|chagalathatha]] || [[word:chagalajaja|chagalajaja]] || [[word:chagalashasha|chagalashasha]] || [[word:chagalaka|chagalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chagalathan|chagalathan]] || [[word:chagalajan|chagalajan]] || [[word:chagalashan|chagalashan]] || [[word:chagalakan|chagalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chagalathaoro|chagalathaoro]] || [[word:chagalajaoro|chagalajaoro]] || [[word:chagalashaoro|chagalashaoro]] || [[word:chagalakaoro|chagalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
